mapper.insert: INSERT INTO POLICY_VERSION ( policy_id, policy_json_path, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{policyId}, #{policyJsonPath}, 'DRAFT', SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE POLICY_VERSION SET status = 'APPROVED', approved_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE policy_id = #{policyId} AND status = 'DRAFT'
UPDATE POLICY_VERSION SET status = 'DEPLOYED', deployed_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE policy_id = #{policyId} AND status = 'APPROVED'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM POLICY_VERSION WHERE status = 'DEPLOYED' ORDER BY deployed_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
